description: Generated expense reports tracking. Each row represents one expense report covering a specific date range with aggregated totals, category breakdowns, and trend data.

Total Expenses.description: Sum of all expenses in the report period

Invoice Count.description: Number of invoices/receipts included in this report

Top Category.description: Expense category with highest total amount in this report

Tax Deductible Amount.description: Sum of fully tax-deductible expenses in the report

Report File.description: Local file path where the Markdown report was saved

Sources Used.description: Data sources used to compile this report

Generated At.description: Timestamp when this report was generated (ISO 8601)
